title: Incredibly Crispy Syrian White Fish Bowl
description: A peppery and crispy Syrian dish featuring white fish fillets, served in a stone bowl, perfect for a light dinner. This recipe combines the flavors of the Middle East with a dash-friendly approach.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the white fish fillets with sumac, paprika, black pepper, and salt.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the fish fillets to the skillet and sear for 2 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and squeeze the lemon juice over the fish.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve in a stone bowl.
Traditionally, this dish is served with a side of rice or vegetables, but feel free to get creative with your sides.
